title: spathiphyllum montanum
intro: Spathiphyllum montanum, also known as the mountain spathiphyllum or mountain umbrella plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arumaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include the ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Spathiphyllum montanum typically involve drying and processing the plant's leaves, which are then used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture.
